data.title: Add dark mode theme
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `ui/ux`

**Description:**
Add dark mode support for better accessibility and user preference.

**Proposed Solution:**
Implement dark mode with system preference detection and manual toggle.

**Features:**

* Auto-detect system dark mode preference
* Manual toggle switch in UI
* Smooth theme transition
* Persist user preference
* Update CSS variables for dark theme

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Dark mode CSS theme implemented
- [ ] Toggle switch in UI
- [ ] Respects system preference
- [ ] Preference persists in localStorage
- [ ] All UI elements properly themed
- [ ] Accessible color contrast ratios

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add dark mode CSS variables
* Use prefers-color-scheme media query
* Add theme toggle component
* Update all colors for dark mode
* Test accessibility (WCAG contrast ratios)

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low-Medium** (CSS variables, toggle component, color palette)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low** (primarily CSS work, straightforward implementation)
* 💎 Value: **Medium** (nice-to-have UX enhancement, accessibility benefit, user preference)
